title: Go 1.26 Toolchain, Module Graph, Dependencies, and Reproduction · Language Lens: Baseline Recovery

checks.pattern: // Evidence: crawler-go-baseline-recovery-85wgsv(?:(?!// Evidence:)[\s\S])*?func\s+evidence_crawler_go_baseline_recovery_85wgsv\s*\([^)]*\)\s*\(bool,\s*int,\s*string\)\s*\{(?=(?:(?!// Evidence:)[\s\S])*?cleanGates < 12)(?=(?:(?!// Evidence:)[\s\S])*?passedGates < 11 \|\| passedGates > cleanGates)(?=(?:(?!// Evidence:)[\s\S])*?binarySmokes < 4)(?=(?:(?!// Evidence:)[\s\S])*?versionGaps > 0)(?=(?:(?!// Evidence:)[\s\S])*?return)(?:(?!// Evidence:)[\s\S])*?return
checks.description: The increment includes the required executable or reviewable evidence structure.
checks.failureMessage: Complete the full function, prompt contract, or gate record shown in the brief.

checks.description: The evidence note explains the model, failure risk, and verification in the learner’s own words.
checks.failureMessage: Add a causal explanation using capture and existing plus specific case evidence.
